walking_skeleton_strategy: Skipped (brownfield). Real-I/O (Strategy C) against a real seeded SQLite metadata DB; primary RED tests are backend pytest at the repository port, mirroring backend/tests/use_cases/dataset/test_archive_dataset.py.

phases.title: Slice 1 — Archive a source (PATCH → Cold Storage)
phases.scope: Add recoverable Cold Storage to a source via PATCH. (1) Migration 021_add_source_cold_storage adds nullable archived_at + retention_until to sources, revising current head 020_add_dataset_model_name (confirm via `alembic heads`); portable add_column, no index (org-scoped via project_id). (2) Extend MetadataRepository.update_source(source_id, **kwargs) generic setter mirroring update_dataset (~12 LOC). (3) New use case archive_source(source_id, *, archived: bool) on @handle_returns/@with_repositories: when archived and archived_at IS NULL -> set archived_at=now(UTC), retention_until=now+90d; re-archive is a no-op preserving the original timestamp (idempotency, ADR-055 c/D4). (4) SourceController.patch_source_archived mirroring DatasetController.archive_dataset. (5) SourceArchiveRequest(BaseModel){archived: bool} + PATCH /api/sources/{source_id} route on the sources router, reusing _authorize_source (404 missing / 403 cross-org). (6) Read-contract exposure: source_to_dict (_mappers.py), Source.serialize()/from_record() gain archived_at + retention_until. (7) DELIVER kickoff: stand up the pytest-bdd harness for the acceptance suite (mirror an existing tests/acceptance/* suite) OR bind slice-1 scenarios onto backend pytest; either way the slice-1 anchor scenario is the regression that fails on today's tree and passes after.
acceptance_criteria: AC1.1 — PATCH {archived:true} on active source -> 200, body has archived_at=request time and retention_until=archived_at+90d
AC1.4 — re-archiving an already-archived source -> 200, archived_at/retention_until unchanged (clock not advanced)
AC1.2 (corrected) — PATCH on a source in another org -> 403 (AuthorizationError), per ADR-055 amendment
AC1.5 — no warehouse/SQL-model side effects, no cascade to child datasets; only the source lifecycle fields change
AC2.4 — source read contract exposes archived_at + retention_until
scenarios_to_unskip: source-cold-storage.feature :: Archiving a source moves it to Cold Storage
source-cold-storage.feature :: Moving an already-archived source to Cold Storage changes nothing
source-cold-storage.feature :: Moving a source that isn't there tells me it isn't there
source-cold-storage.feature :: I cannot touch a source that belongs to another organization
primary_tests: backend/tests/use_cases/source/test_archive_source.py (port-level: sets both fields; re-archive preserves archived_at; unknown id -> SourceNotFound; db error -> Failure)
backend/tests/routers/test_sources.py (PATCH 200 round-trip fields; 404 unknown; 403 cross-org; 422 malformed body)
phases.files_changed_estimate: migrations/versions/021_add_source_cold_storage.py (NEW). backend/app/repositories/metadata/repository.py (+update_source ~12 LOC). backend/app/use_cases/source/archive_source.py (NEW ~30 LOC). backend/app/controllers/source_controller.py (+patch_source_archived). backend/app/routers/sources.py (+PATCH route). backend/app/routers/schemas/source.py (+SourceArchiveRequest). backend/app/repositories/metadata/_mappers.py (+2 keys). backend/app/models/source.py (+2 fields). Estimated size: M.
exit_criteria: Slice-1 anchor scenario GREEN; regression fails on origin/main (no endpoint) and passes after
AC1.1-1.5 + AC2.4 all satisfied by port-level and router tests
`alembic heads` single head; 021 up/down clean on SQLite
Reviewer approves hexagonal boundary (route -> controller -> use case -> repo port) and idempotency clock-preservation

phases.title: Slice 2 — Cold-Storage listing (default-exclude + ?archived=true)
phases.scope: Make the active catalog default-exclude archived sources and expose Cold Storage. (1) Extend MetadataRepository.list_sources(project_id, archived: bool | None) mirroring list_datasets (repository.py:350-368): None/False -> archived_at IS NULL; True -> archived_at IS NOT NULL. (2) Add archived query param (default false) to GET /api/sources on the sources router, threaded through SourceController. (3) GET /api/sources/{source_id} remains unfiltered (direct fetch returns an archived source).
acceptance_criteria: AC2.1 — GET /api/sources default-excludes archived (archived_at IS NULL)
AC2.3 — GET /api/sources/{source_id} returns an archived source (direct fetch not filtered)
scenarios_to_unskip: source-cold-storage.feature :: Archived sources leave the active catalog but stay findable
primary_tests: backend/tests/routers/test_sources.py (default excludes archived; ?archived=true only archived; GET by id returns archived)
phases.files_changed_estimate: backend/app/repositories/metadata/repository.py (list_sources +archived filter). backend/app/routers/sources.py (+archived query param). backend/app/controllers/source_controller.py (thread param). Estimated size: S.
exit_criteria: Slice-2 scenario GREEN; slice-1 scenarios still GREEN
AC2.1-2.3 satisfied by repository + router tests
Reviewer confirms the filter mirrors list_datasets shape

phases.title: Slice 3 — Restore (symmetric PATCH {archived:false}) + round-trip
phases.scope: Restore is the same PATCH surface with {archived:false}: archive_source clears archived_at + retention_until unconditionally via update_source. No /restore endpoint. Add the full round-trip assertion (archive -> default-list excludes -> ?archived=true includes -> restore -> default-list includes).
acceptance_criteria: AC3.1 — PATCH {archived:false} on an archived source -> 200, clears both archived_at and retention_until
AC3.2 — restoring an already-active source is idempotent -> 200, fields stay null
AC3.3 — org-scoped + 404/403 semantics identical to Slice 1
scenarios_to_unskip: source-cold-storage.feature :: Restoring a source brings it back into the active catalog
source-cold-storage.feature :: Restoring an already-active source changes nothing
phases.files_changed_estimate: backend/app/use_cases/source/archive_source.py (restore branch, mostly covered by the boolean already). backend/tests/* round-trip additions. Estimated size: S.
exit_criteria: Slice-3 scenarios GREEN; slice-1 + slice-2 scenarios still GREEN
AC3.1-3.3 satisfied; round-trip test passes end to end
Polecat files follow-up: /nw-finalize source-soft-delete-cold-storage (migrate artifacts to docs/evolution/)
Reviewer approves PATCH symmetry (no /restore) and idempotent restore

manual_review_gates.gate: PATCH archive endpoint live + org-scoped; idempotent clock-preserving; migration head clean; read contract carries both fields; anchor regression green
Default list excludes archived; ?archived=true returns Cold Storage; direct GET-by-id unfiltered; slice-1 still green
Restore symmetric + idempotent; full round-trip green; ready for /nw-finalize

deliver_dispatch_notes.paradigm: Python OOP; FastAPI route -> SourceController -> archive_source use case (@handle_returns/@with_repositories) -> MetadataRepository port. Mirror the dataset MR-7 cold-storage machinery WITHOUT extracting a shared abstraction (ADR-055 defers to the rule of three; prefer a Protocol later). Follow the backend-use-case + alembic-migration skills.
deliver_dispatch_notes.iron_rule: NEVER modify a failing test to make it pass. The slice-1 anchor scenario must fail on origin/main (no endpoint) and pass after implementation. After 3 failed attempts on a step, revert and escalate.
deliver_dispatch_notes.tdd_cycle: RED_ACCEPTANCE (unskip one scenario) -> RED_UNIT (smallest failing port-level use-case/router test) -> GREEN (minimum code) -> REFACTOR per RPP L1-L6 -> next scenario. One scenario per cycle.
